mapper.insert: insert into supfusion_i18n_resource( id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid , creator , modifier , create_time , modify_time ) values( #{id}, #{i18nKey}, #{i18nValue}, #{languCode}, #{moduleCode}, #{moduleVersionCode}, #{valid}, #{creator}, #{modifier}, #{createTime}, #{modifyTime} )

insert into supfusion_i18n_resource ( id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid , creator , modifier , create_time , modify_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.i18nKey}, #{item.i18nValue}, #{item.languCode}, #{item.moduleCode}, #{item.moduleVersionCode}, #{item.valid}, #{item.creator}, #{item.modifier}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.modifyTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT count( t.i18n_key ) FROM ( SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE valid = '1'
AND i18n_key LIKE '%${i18n_key}%'
AND langu_code = #{langu_code} AND i18n_value LIKE '%${i18n_value}%'
group by i18n_key ) t

SELECT i18n_key FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(ORDER BY d.modify_time DESC,d.i18n_key DESC) ROW_NUM ,i18n_key FROM (
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by i18n_key ORDER BY r.modify_time DESC) ROW_ID, i18n_key,modify_time FROM supfusion_i18n_resource r WHERE valid = 1
AND i18n_key LIKE '%${i18n_key}%'
AND langu_code = #{langu_code} AND i18n_value LIKE '%${i18n_value}%'
) t1 WHERE t1.ROW_ID = 1 ) d ) t where
t.ROW_NUM BETWEEN (${offset}) and (${offset} + ${limit})

SELECT count( t.i18n_key ) FROM ( SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE valid = '1'
AND i18n_key LIKE '%${i18n_key}%'
AND i18n_value LIKE '%${i18n_value}%'
group by i18n_key ) t

SELECT i18n_key FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(ORDER BY d.modify_time DESC,d.i18n_key DESC ) ROW_NUM ,i18n_key FROM (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by i18n_key ORDER BY r.modify_time DESC) ROW_ID, i18n_key,modify_time FROM supfusion_i18n_resource r WHERE valid = 1
AND i18n_key LIKE '%${i18n_key}%'
AND r.i18n_value LIKE '%${i18n_value}%'
) t1 WHERE t1.ROW_ID = 1 ) d ) t where
t.ROW_NUM BETWEEN (${offset}) and (${offset} + ${limit})

SELECT id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid , creator , modifier , create_time , modify_time FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE valid = '1' AND i18n_key in
#{i18n_key}

SELECT id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid from supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE 1=1
AND module_code = #{moduleCode} and langu_code = #{languCode} and valid = '1'

SELECT i18n_key FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(ORDER BY d.modify_time DESC,d.i18n_key DESC) ROW_NUM ,i18n_key FROM (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by i18n_key ORDER BY r.modify_time DESC) ROW_ID, i18n_key,modify_time FROM supfusion_i18n_resource r WHERE valid = 1 AND
r.i18n_key LIKE '%${i18n_key}%'
) t1 WHERE t1.ROW_ID = 1 ) d ) t where
t.ROW_NUM BETWEEN (${offset}) and (${offset} + ${limit})

SELECT count( t.i18n_key ) FROM ( SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE valid = '1' AND
i18n_key LIKE '%${i18n_key}%'
group by i18n_key ) t

SELECT i18n_key FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(ORDER BY d.modify_time DESC,d.i18n_key DESC) ROW_NUM ,i18n_key FROM (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by i18n_key ORDER BY r.modify_time DESC) ROW_ID, i18n_key,modify_time FROM supfusion_i18n_resource r WHERE valid = 1
AND i18n_key LIKE '%${i18nKey}%'
AND langu_code = #{languCode}
AND
i18n_value LIKE '%${i18n_value}%'
) t1 WHERE t1.ROW_ID = 1 ) d ) t where
t.ROW_NUM BETWEEN (${offset}) and (${offset} + ${limit})
SELECT count( t.i18n_key ) FROM ( SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE valid = '1' AND i18n_key LIKE '%${i18n_key}%' group by i18n_key ) t

SELECT i18n_key FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over( ORDER BY d.modify_time DESC,d.i18n_key DESC ) ROW_NUM ,i18n_key FROM (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by i18n_key ORDER BY r.modify_time DESC) ROW_ID, i18n_key,modify_time FROM supfusion_i18n_resource r WHERE valid = 1 AND i18n_key LIKE '%${i18n_key}%' ) t1 WHERE t1.ROW_ID = 1 ) d ) t where
t.ROW_NUM BETWEEN (${offset}) and (${offset} + ${limit})
SELECT count( i18n_value ) FROM ( SELECT i18n_value FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE valid = '1' AND langu_code = #{langu_code} AND i18n_value LIKE '%${i18n_value}%' ) t

SELECT i18n_value FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over(ORDER BY r.modify_time DESC) ROW_ID, i18n_value,modify_time FROM supfusion_i18n_resource r WHERE valid = 1 AND langu_code = #{langu_code} AND i18n_value LIKE '%${i18n_value}%' ) t where
t.ROW_ID BETWEEN (${offset}) and (${offset} + ${limit})

select id , i18n_key , langu_code , i18n_value from supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE 1=1
AND i18n_key = #{i18nKey} and valid = '1'

select id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid , creator , modifier , create_time , modify_time from supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE 1=1
AND i18n_key = #{key} and valid = '1'
